title: Judge Finds Trump Administration’s Third-Country Deportations Unlawful
author: Mattathias Schwartz
fullText: The ruling repudiates a key Homeland Security Department policy of sending immigrants to countries where they have no ties. The judge paused his ruling to allow for an appeal.
summary: The ruling repudiates a key Homeland Security Department policy of sending immigrants to countries where they have no ties. The judge paused his ruling to allow for an appeal.
